conclusions: ε(z) peak confirmed at z=0.4 (M8-A-R1 [VERIFIED-tool] — NOT REDEFINED).
Candidate A (PS density, M_min=5e14): r=-0.0999 → INSUFFICIENT. Monotone decreasing — anti-correlated with ε — KILLED.
Candidate B (intrinsic dN/dz, M_min=5e14): r=0.6992 → PARTIAL. Peak location M_min-sensitive — not a fixed physics prediction.
Candidate C (SZ-selection-weighted, M_min=5e14): r=0.6642 → PARTIAL. Selection function artificially anchors peak at z=0.40.
Selection function ALONE: r(ε, f_sel) = 0.666. SPURIOUS CORRELATION CONFIRMED: instrument model (zero physics) produces correlation similar to M8-C r=0.723.
Candidate D (ΛCDM transition, f_DE): r=0.1673 → INSUFFICIENT. Monotone; z_eq=0.296 (proximity 0.104 to ε peak). Cannot explain non-monotone ε structure.
PARTIAL-KILL: intrinsic cluster formation history KILLED; selection/schedule artifact SURVIVES as alternative explanation.
M8-C r=0.723 may be selection-driven (ARTIFACT) not physical cluster formation. Author schedule Q2 still needed to determine which.
